title: COFFEE FESTIVAL 2021
p_01: Al Fayomi Coffee was the official sponsor of the Coffee Festival 2021, featuring a presence by the Ambassador of Indonesia.
p_02: This event highlighted the company's commitment to the coffee industry and showcased Indonesian coffee culture.

title: CAFEX EXPO 2023
p_01: Al Fayomi Coffee is a prominent exhibitor at Cafex (and related HORECA expos) in Egypt, specializing in supplying cafes and restaurants with premium products like specialty, French, instant, and Arabian coffee.
p_02: They have showcased their brand with custom designed stands, focusing on providing high-quality, specialized coffee solutions for the hospitality industry.
